tam.formula: Estimated annual spend across PM starter tools, onboarding systems, and lightweight operating-model packages for product teams.

sam.formula: Reachable spend among English-speaking B2B product teams that are actively rebuilding their PM operating model.

som.formula: Near-term reachable spend from high-intent teams that value explicit lifecycle traceability over generic flexibility.

top_down_inputs.label: Starter-tooling category estimate
top_down_inputs.value: PM starter and workflow tooling budget subset

bottom_up_inputs.label: Design-partner starter path
bottom_up_inputs.value: 60 teams x starter subscription and services envelope

assumptions.statement: The reachable starter wedge is concentrated in teams that want operating-model clarity before they optimize for breadth or ecosystem depth.

sensitivity_notes: The reachable segment shrinks quickly if teams prefer broad incumbent suites despite weaker trace readability.
prioritization_implications: The starter wedge is large enough to justify explicit prioritization artifacts without claiming broad category leadership.
The sizing math supports staying narrow and high-trust before expanding starter surface area.
